title: ABB and Allied Green Ammonia Sign MOU to Accelerate the Energy Transition with Green Hydrogen and Ammonia
content: Allied Green Ammonia, a global industry leader in clean energy infrastructure, is rapidly advancing the development of its flagship green ammonia plant proposed for construction in Northern Territory Australia. ABB is providing support with products and solution expertise that are key to AGAâ€™s engineering and design and enabling the project developers to make the Final Investment Decision (FID).
author: Analysts Account
